text: Set Up Emails | HackerRank Knowledge Base Set Up Emails Use email communication to engage eligible candidates to improve participation on the day of your event. Set up email sequences You can customize the recommended emails to align with your brand tone and communication strategy. To set up an email sequence: Log in to Engage using your credentials. Log in to Engage using your credentials. Select the event for which you want to set up the email sequence. Select the event for which you want to set up the email sequence. Go to the Emails tab. The Email Sequences tab displays all candidate-facing emails, including the Registration Confirmation Email, Engagement Emails, Invitation Email, and Reminder Email. Go to the Emails tab. The Email Sequences tab displays all candidate-facing emails, including the Registration Confirmation Email, Engagement Emails, Invitation Email, and Reminder Email. Select the email you want to edit, and update the content as needed. For Engagement Emails, a Review Required label appears if edits are pending. You must review and update the content. Note: You are required to review only the Engagement Emails. The other emails use a standard template and are optional to edit. Select the email you want to edit, and update the content as needed. For Engagement Emails, a Review Required label appears if edits are pending. You must review and update the content. Note: You are required to review only the Engagement Emails. The other emails use a standard template and are optional to edit. For Engagement Emails, a Review Required label appears if edits are pending. You must review and update the content. Note: You are required to review only the Engagement Emails. The other emails use a standard template and are optional to edit. Click Save to apply your changes. Click Save to apply your changes. (Optional) Click Send Preview Email to send a preview to yourself. (Optional) Click Send Preview Email to send a preview to yourself. (Optional) Click the email settings icon at the top right corner to configure the Reply-to address for registration confirmation, invitation, and reminder emails. (Optional) Click the email settings icon at the top right corner to configure the Reply-to address for registration confirmation, invitation, and reminder emails. After you save all engagement emails, a confirmation dialog appears. Click Save & Start to begin sending engagement emails immediately. Note: You must publish the microsite to activate the engagement
